gaps: Plain MCP exposes Kit v4 endpoints one at a time, leaving agents to discover resource relationships, manage fan-out, and summarize account state manually.
patterns: Creator marketing agents need account, audience, content, and broadcast context before safely choosing narrower write or read endpoints.
Read-only compound workflows reduce token use and permission prompts while keeping raw endpoint parity available for exact operations.

novel_features.name: Creator Snapshot
novel_features.description: One-call read-only operating snapshot for Kit account, growth, audience, content, webhooks, and broadcast stats.
novel_features.rationale: Combines the operating context an agent needs before campaign planning or account diagnosis.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this first when an agent needs current creator-account context without manually fanning out across endpoint mirrors.

novel_features.name: Audience Health
novel_features.description: Read-only subscriber status counts, recent growth stats, and largest tags by subscriber count.
novel_features.rationale: Turns several subscriber and tag calls into one audience-health surface for cleanup and segmentation decisions.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this before list cleaning, segmentation, or campaign planning to avoid multiple fragile subscriber and tag calls.

novel_features.name: Content Inventory
novel_features.description: Read-only inventory of sequences, sequence emails, snippets, forms, templates, and recent broadcast stats.
novel_features.rationale: Collects Kit content surfaces that agents usually need together when planning or auditing campaigns.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this for content audits and planning instead of separately listing each Kit content surface.

novel_features.name: Subscriber Lookup
novel_features.description: Read-only subscriber dossier by email or id with profile, custom fields, tags, attribution, and email stats.
novel_features.rationale: Combines subscriber details, tags, and engagement stats into a support-safe single-record lookup.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this for support, segmentation checks, and personalization debugging before raw subscriber endpoint calls.

narrative.headline: Kit CLI with read-only creator operations, audience health, content inventory, and subscriber lookup workflows.
narrative.value_prop: Wrap Kit's v4 API and add compact workflow commands for the account, audience, content, and subscriber context agents need before choosing narrower endpoint operations.

quickstart.comment: Check the auth diagnostic surface before making live API calls.
Inspect the one-call operating snapshot workflow.
Inspect the audience health workflow before segmentation or cleanup.
